CI
Career Interpreter AI
How it works?

How Career Interpreter AI Works

We combine advanced LLMs with vector embeddings to match your profile against the real job market.

The Pipeline

1. CV Parsing

We extract structured data (skills, experience, education) from your uploaded PDF.

2. Embedding Match

Your profile is converted into a vector and compared against 750+ local jobs using cosine similarity.

3. AI Diagnostic

Our AI analyzes the gaps between your CV and the top matches to generate a roadmap.

Data Sources

Our matching engine is powered by a curated dataset of 750+ real job postings from leading tech companies in the middle east, including:

  • Jordan
  • Saudi Arabia
  • Egypt
  • Umited Arab Emirates

Data is segmented across Software Engineering, Cybersecurity, and Data Science tracks.
